creator: mph@pobox.com
text:
The author of Angband updated the distfile to fix some bugs in the
2.8.3 release.  My port will whine about bad checksums until the
md5 file is updated.

Fix: Apply the following trivial patch.  Also, files/CHANGES-2.8.2 is a
relic that the port no longer uses.  It may be removed.
